01705|       const safeValue = (v: string | undefined | null): bigint => {

01710|       // Send only to/data/value — never forward Relay's maxFeePerGas/maxPriorityFeePerGas.
01711|       // Those values are set at quote time and become stale within seconds. If the current
01712|       // base fee exceeds the quoted maxFeePerGas, MetaMask simulates the tx as failing and
01713|       // shows "This transaction is likely to fail". Letting the wallet pick current gas
01714|       // prices avoids this entirely — the calldata validity is independent of gas price.
01715|       const txParams = {
